snippet.title: Chambers Talks Episode 27: Achieving the American Dream with Hock Tan of Broadcom
snippet.description: If you’re looking for a prime example of the American Dream, look no further than President & CEO of Broadcom, Hock Tan. 50 years ago, Hock arrived in America with a plan to get a great education and never stopped pursuing his own American Dream. From working at General Motors and PepsiCo, to leading several semiconductor companies, Hock knows the value of staying open to new, exciting opportunities. Today, he is taking that mentality and applying it to Broadcom, where, as Hock shares on episode 27 of Chambers Talks, innovative ideas and “moonshots” abound.

snippet.title: VMware Acquisition Close: Q&A with Hock Tan, President and CEO, Broadcom - Six Five Insider
snippet.description:
On this episode of The Six Five - Insider Edition, hosts Daniel Newman and Patrick Moorhead welcome Broadcom’s Hock Tan, President and CEO, for an inside look at the future of a combined Broadcom and VMware, the company’s private and hybrid cloud strategy, security, and more.
 
Their discussion covers:
 
* What to expect from a combined Broadcom and VMware and what the company plans to focus on throughout this next fiscal year

* Broadcom’s private and hybrid cloud strategy and what role VMware will play in furthering that strategy

* The impact of the VMware acquisition on Broadcom’s customers, and how what it means for the future of the private cloud

* How the inclusion of VMware’s services, will help Broadcom’s customers navigate challenging security issues

* How Broadcom plans to incorporate VMware’s existing partners into Broadcom’s robust partner ecosystem and what VMware partners can expect in the coming months

#broadcom, #vmware, #hocktan, #security, #cloud, #multicloud, #privatecloud, #partnerecosystem, #patrickmoorhead, #danielnewman, #thesixfive,

We are not investment advisors, and we ask that you do not treat us as such.

snippet.title: Hock Tan, Broadcom | Building a Broader IT Modernization Strategy
snippet.description:
Broadcom President and CEO Hock Tan says the merger of Broadcom and VMware will allow for more investment in IT solutions that provide greater flexibility to modernize applications, manage software and services, and secure data across clouds. Tan says this will “give federal agencies the tools to control their own destiny” in multi-cloud environments, all while “increasing choice and reducing risk.”

This video is part of a series of interviews with leaders in federal agencies and industry. We explore federal agencies efforts to collect, manage and analyze vast volumes of data, securely in a multi-cloud operating environment. This series was produced by Scoop News Group and underwritten by Broadcom.
